ast.name: setDesc

ast.source: Search for a map image in your vault

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used to store map data. Set to a unique value to use the same image on multiple maps.
ast.target: 用于存储地图数据。设置为唯一值可在多个地图上使用同一图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display dimensions (blank = auto from image aspect ratio)
ast.target: 显示尺寸（留空 = 根据图像宽高比自动计算）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Zoom range (%) and step size per scroll increment
ast.target: 缩放范围（%）及每次滚动的步进大小

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevent zooming. Scroll wheel passes through to page scroll
ast.target: 禁止缩放。滚轮事件将传递至页面滚动

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 禁止通过点击拖动进行平移

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 禁止通过点击拖动移动标记点

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 请先通过点击标尺图标并测量参考距离来设置地图上的距离比例尺

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How distances are converted for display

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of decimal places shown in distance values
ast.target: 距离值显示的小数位数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control marker visibility based on zoom level

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 用于基于缩放显示/隐藏的可见性图层

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Link to a note. Type # for headings, #^ for blocks
ast.target: 链接到笔记。输入 # 用于标题，#^ 用于块

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display name shown instead of the note filename
ast.target: 显示名称，用于替代笔记文件名显示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Note shown on hover preview (blank uses the linked note)
ast.target: 悬停预览时显示的笔记（留空则使用链接的笔记）

ast.source: How many units does this line represent?

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 显示高度（留空 = 根据宽度/图像自动计算）

ast.target: 显示宽度（留空 = 根据高度/图像自动计算）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a vault folder for the imported image

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Visual size of markers on all maps (%)
ast.target: 所有地图上标记点的视觉大小（%）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Screen-constant keeps markers the same size on screen. Fixed to map makes markers shrink when zoomed out and grow when zoomed in.
ast.target: 屏幕常量使标记在屏幕上保持相同大小。固定到地图则使标记在缩小地图时缩小，在放大地图时增大。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of markers rendered at once. Reduces lag on maps with many markers.
ast.target: 一次渲染的最大标记数量。减少标记较多的地图上的延迟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Visual size of marker text labels on all maps (%)
ast.target: 所有地图上标记文本标签的视觉大小 (%)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Screen-constant keeps text the same size on screen. Fixed to map makes text shrink when zoomed out and grow when zoomed in.
ast.target: 屏幕常量使文本在屏幕上保持相同大小。固定到地图则使文本在缩小地图时缩小，在放大地图时增大。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font family used for marker labels on all maps
ast.target: 所有地图上标记标签使用的字体系列

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control whether marker labels are shown on all maps
ast.target: 控制是否在所有地图上显示标记标签

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 地图控件的静止不透明度 (%)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: View and delete stored map data (markers, layers, scale, settings)
ast.target: 查看和删除存储的地图数据（标记、图层、比例尺、设置）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this plugin is useful to you, consider buying me a coffee!
ast.target: 如果这个插件对您有用，请考虑请我喝杯咖啡！

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Migrate - move all data to the new ID, delete the old
ast.target: 迁移 - 将所有数据移动到新 ID，删除旧数据

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Copy - copy all data to the new ID, keep the old
ast.target: 复制 - 将所有数据复制到新 ID，保留旧数据

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Orphan - start fresh with the new ID, keep old data behind
ast.target: 孤立 - 使用新 ID 重新开始，旧数据保留在原地

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Delete - start fresh with the new ID, permanently delete old data
ast.target: 删除 - 使用新 ID 重新开始，永久删除旧数据

ast.target: 您有未保存的更改。您想怎么做？

ast.target: 选择如何处理现有数据：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will override custom values on those fields. Are you sure?
ast.target: 这将覆盖这些字段上的自定义值。您确定吗？

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will replace all your current templates and folders with the built-in defaults. Any custom templates will be lost.
ast.target: 这将用内置默认值替换您当前所有的模板和文件夹。任何自定义模板都将丢失。
